overview.description: The Palmer Square CLO Senior Debt ETF (PSQA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Palmer Square CLO Senior Debt index. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of floating rate, USD-denominated arbitrage collateralized loan obligations (CLOs) rated as AAA or AA by at least one of the major rating agencies. The fund specifically invests in the senior tranches of a CLO PSQA was launched on Sep 11, 2024 and is issued by Palmer Square.
